basic_details.job_title: Oil India CNC Programmer cum Operator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Oil India (OIL) CNC Programmer cum Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 08 May 2026 on the official website of Oil India . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the OIL CNC Programmer cum Operator Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 40 years who have Diploma in Mechanical/Production/Electrical/Electronics & Tele-Communication along with Certificate Course in Assistant Operator-CNC Turning and minimum 2 years post-qualification experience on CNC Machines are eligible to apply for these CNC Programmer cum Operator vacancies. The walk-in registration and personal

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: CNC Programmer cum Operator: Must have passed Diploma in Mechanical/Production/Electrical/Electronics & Tele-Communication or equivalent examination of minimum 02 (two) years duration from a Government Recognized Institute/Board. Must possess Certificate Course in Assistant Operator- CNC Turning or equivalent certificate course of minimum 06 (six) months duration or 600 hours duration from a recognized institute. Must have minimum 02 (Two) years post-qualification work experience on programming, operating and working in different types of CNC Machines including hands-on operation of CNC Lathe in any Govt./PSU/Reputed Private Organization.

salary_details.details: Fixed emolument: ₹ 24,960.00 per month based on attendance including paid leave, holiday, if any. Variable emolument: ₹ 960.00 per day for each working day.
